summary: Comprehensive testing of CRM Customer Profile Medication Tracking system completed. Backend: 100% pass rate (15/15 tests). Frontend: All critical features verified and working correctly including login, customer profile, medication tracking with dosage/timing/food relation, call logging, and tab navigation.

issues: RC badge is visible but appears small - text 'rc' shown in rose-colored badge. Consider making badge more prominent with full text 'RC Customer'

passed_tests: Backend: Admin login (admin@sahakar.com / admin123) returns token
Backend: CRM staff login (crm@sahakar.com / crm123) returns token
Backend: GET /api/stores returns list of stores
Backend: POST /api/crm/customers creates walk-in customer
Backend: GET /api/crm/customers/{id} returns profile with medicine_calendar, dosage, timing, food_relation
Backend: PUT /api/crm/customers/{id}/type converts walkin to RC
Backend: POST /api/crm/purchases creates medicine with dosage, timing, food_relation
Backend: PUT /api/crm/purchases/{id}/medication-details updates medication details
Backend: PUT /api/crm/purchases/{id}/stop stops medicine
Backend: POST /api/crm/calls logs call with result and remarks
Backend: GET /api/crm/dashboard returns KPIs
Backend: GET /api/crm/refill-due returns refill due list
Backend: Customer ID 1 profile returns Test Patient with Metformin 500mg
Frontend: Login page loads correctly with email/password fields
Frontend: Admin login redirects to dashboard
Frontend: Customer profile page (/crm/customer/1) loads with data-testid
Frontend: Customer shows 'rc' badge indicating RC customer type
Frontend: Medicine Calendar tab displays Metformin 500mg with medication details
Frontend: Dosage (2 tablets), Timing (morning, lunch, dinner), Food relation (before food) visible
Frontend: Add Medicine button opens dialog with all required fields
Frontend: Add Medicine dialog has Medication Details section (dosage, timing, food_relation)
Frontend: Log Call button opens dialog with Call Result dropdown and Remarks
Frontend: Call logging works - success toast shown
Frontend: Edit (pencil) icon opens Edit Medication Details dialog
Frontend: Edit dialog shows Dosage, Timing, Food Relation, Days of Medication fields
Frontend: Purchases tab renders without errors
Frontend: Repeat Medicines tab renders without errors
Frontend: Timeline tab shows call logs and refill tracking events

seed_data_verified.medicine: Metformin 500mg with dosage: 2 tablets, timing: morning,lunch,dinner, food_relation: before food

context_for_next_testing_agent: All CRM medication tracking features are working correctly. Customer ID 1 (Test Patient) is an RC customer with active medicine Metformin 500mg. Backend uses PostgreSQL with SQLAlchemy async. Frontend uses React with Shadcn/UI components. Call logging creates entries visible in Timeline tab.
